feature_calculations.pct_combat: avg(enemiesHit, damageDone, timeInCombat, kills, damagePerHit) — 5 features (v2.2)
feature_calculations.pct_explore: avg(distanceTraveled, timeSprinting) — 2 active features; timeOutOfCombat excluded (v2.1)

scoring_notes.method: per-archetype average so each archetype has equal ceiling of 1.0 regardless of feature count
scoring_notes.timeOutOfCombat_reason: Passive signal: accumulates when no enemies are available, regardless of player intent. Arithmetic complement of timeInCombat — including both is redundant. Exploration measured by active signals only.
scoring_notes.damagePerHit_formula: damageDone_raw / max(enemiesHit_raw, 1) — weapon-class-agnostic combat intensity, captures sniper/heavy archetypes
scoring_notes.pickupAttemptRate_formula: pickupAttempts_raw / max(timeNearInteractables_raw, 1) — deliberateness of collection intent, reduces Collect/Explore cluster contamination
